recommendations.title: Outlander
recommendations.overview: During the reign of the Vikings, a man from another world crash-lands on Earth, bringing with him an alien predator. The man must fuse his advanced technology with the weaponry of the vikings to fight the monster.

recommendations.title: The Untamed
recommendations.overview: A meteorite deposits an alien monster with strange powers near the home of an unhappy couple.

recommendations.title: Phantoms
recommendations.overview: In the peaceful Colorado town of Snowfield, something evil has wiped out the community. And now, it's up to a group of people to stop it, or at least get out of Snowfield alive.

recommendations.title: A Shaun the Sheep Movie: Farmageddon
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: When an alien with amazing powers crash-lands near Mossy Bottom Farm, Shaun the Sheep goes on a mission to shepherd the intergalactic visitor home before a sinister organization can capture her.

recommendations.title: Spectral
recommendations.overview: A special-ops team is dispatched to fight supernatural beings that have taken over a European city.

recommendations.title: Invasion of the Body Snatchers
recommendations.overview: A small-town doctor learns that the population of his community is being replaced by emotionless alien duplicates.

recommendations.title: Day of the Dead
recommendations.overview: When a small Colorado town is overrun by the flesh hungry dead, a small group of survivors try to escape in a last ditch effort to stay alive.

recommendations.title: Megalodon Rising
recommendations.overview: When history’s greatest aquatic predator returns, the armada of modern warships sent to destroy it has no chance at all.

recommendations.title: Monster Hunters
recommendations.overview: When an alien prison ship crash lands and unleashes creature after creature in the California desert, they make quick work of the army that tries to stop them. Now, the only hope of stopping the aliens rests with a secret branch of the government spe

recommendations.title: Prey
recommendations.overview: When danger threatens her camp, the fierce and highly skilled Comanche warrior Naru sets out to protect her people. But the prey she stalks turns out to be a highly evolved alien predator with a technically advanced arsenal.
